title: paramignya lobata
intro: Paramignya lobata, also known as the Yellow Murraya or Wild Orange, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paramignya lobata include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
